# NOCTVM

NOCTVM is a nightlife discovery and social platform for Bucharest, Romania.

## What it does
- Aggregates events from 8 sources in real-time (RA, iaBilet, LiveTickets, Eventbook, Fever, ZileInopti, OneEvent, ControlClub)
- Social feed: posts, stories, comments, likes, reposts, follows
- Venue discovery with interactive maps
- Moonrays: gamified virtual currency for engagement and prestige
- PWA: installable on Android and iOS

## Target audience
18–35 year olds in Bucharest and Romania interested in nightlife, events, music, clubs, and bars.

## Currently available in
Bucharest (primary), Constanta (beta)

## Website
https://noctvm.app

## Contact
contact@noctvm.com
